title: Former Deloitte & LKS tax practitioners Abhishek Ranjan, Akash Mittal and Sadhvi Gupta launch F&S Legal
description: Abhishek Ranjan, Akash Mittal and Sadhvi Gupta have left Deloitte’s tax practice to launch Fair and Square Legal (‘F&S Legal’), a firm focused on tax, regulatory and commercial law matters.The Firm is headquartered in Noida and operates offices in Delhi and Mumbai.F&S Legal is built around a focused practice in indirect tax, direct tax, corporate and commercial law, and allied regulatory matters. The firm’s indirect tax work spans GST, Customs, Central Excise, Service Tax, VAT and State
